narrative:
Precinct West Manchester Village (precinct in Preble County) has 260 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
